## **Bugs and stability** {#theme-bugs_stability}

   **Bugs and stability.**
      11 recent review(s) mention bugs and stability.
      Review window: Jun 8, 2026 - Jul 15, 2026
      **Why it matters:** Users report reliability problems. This points to quality gaps competitors can exploit.

         **Review examples:**
            1. _Wvoqfent_, Jun 26, 2026, 1/5: "After the latest update, the app is very slow and does not block the apps even when rules are active. Please fix it!"
            2. _machitivuole_, Jul 9, 2026, 2/5: "The last update has made this app so much worse than it was!! So many things were changed that didn’t need to be changed and it’s overall so glitchy now. Moreover the push notifications have become so annoying (and way too frequent). 😔😔😔"
            3. _Camille0303R_, Jun 21, 2026, 2/5: "I have been using this app since it first came out, sadly now it’s unusable if you don’t pay. I’m honestly extremely disappointed by this new update, every update added unnecessary features and new paywalls. I used to love this app and I have recommended it to countless friends, but I’m not able to use it anymore it’s such a shame. I would prefer if the ten seconds to unlock your time limits would be with an add and in exchange not have to pay then this …"
